examples: A desperate honesty that throbs through his confession does not absolve him from sins of diabolical cunning. He is abnormal.
This cannot absolve you from all responsibility.
Just because one uses JDBC, it does not absolve you from having to layer code correctly.
She did not mind giving him solace, but she was not there to absolve him.
But can winning absolve an athlete of his or her glaring sins and lapses in judgment?
